general.name: HBC Sub CA 01
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C0D7A4DB-E537-40A6-A4B9-AD932A0DC386</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C0D7A4DB-E537-40A6-A4B9-AD932A0DC386</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>HBC Sub CA 01</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>6D953AE5-3CC0-44A7-9D67-9B04482E98DC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's Bay Company</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>6D953AE5-3CC0-44A7-9D67-9B04482E98DC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>HBC Sub CA 01</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>HBC Sub CA 01.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
